title: classroom50/classroom/v1
description: Machine-readable schema for <classroom>/classroom.json, the per-classroom metadata scaffolded by `gh teacher classroom add` (cli/gh-teacher/classroom.go, classroomJSON). Hand-authored classrooms omit `migrated_from`; only `gh teacher classroom migrate` writes it. additionalProperties is true so a top-level field a newer binary or the web GUI adds survives a read-modify-write verbatim (the 'tolerate AND preserve' rule, via configrepo.ClassroomJSON.Extra). Known sub-objects (team/migrated_from) stay closed.

short_name.description: URL/path-safe slug; the directory name under the config repo and the Pages path segment.

term.description: Free-form term label (e.g. "Fall 2026"); may be empty.

org.description: The GitHub organization login that owns this classroom.

migrated_from.description: Provenance written only by `gh teacher classroom migrate`.

team.description: The per-classroom GitHub team (created by `gh teacher classroom add`/`migrate`) that grants rostered students read on private, org-owned assignment templates. Omitted on classrooms created before this feature.

id.description: Immutable GitHub team id; the handle `classroom remove` deletes by.

slug.description: GitHub team slug; the authoritative addressing key for membership and repo-grant operations.

secret.description: Optional access key for an unlisted classroom. When present, publish-pages serves this classroom's resources at an unguessable URL (`<classroom>/<secret>/...`) that every consumer inserts; when omitted, the plain `<classroom>/...` path. Obscurity, not access control — anyone with the link can read the files. Opt-in via `gh teacher classroom add --unlisted`.

active.description: Classroom lifecycle flag: false = archived, true or ABSENT = active (legacy classrooms read as active). Written only when a teacher toggles archive/unarchive. Archived classrooms drop out of the default classes list and block new assignments/edits; once published to classrooms-index.json the student accept page refuses too.
